refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the Z minima of a 2D or 3D bounding box or a geometry.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns the Z minima of a 2D or 3D bounding box or a geometry.

note.para: Although this function is only defined for box3d, it also works for box2d and geometry values due to automatic casting. However it will not accept a geometry or box2d text representation, since those do not auto-cast.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT ST_ZMin('BOX3D(1 2 3, 4 5 6)'); st_zmin ------- 3
SELECT ST_ZMin(ST_GeomFromEWKT('LINESTRING(1 3 4, 5 6 7)')); st_zmin ------- 4
SELECT ST_ZMin('BOX3D(-3 2 1, 3 4 1)' ); st_zmin ------- 1 --Observe THIS DOES NOT WORK because it will try to auto-cast the string representation to a BOX3D SELECT ST_ZMin('LINESTRING(1 3 4, 5 6 7)');
--ERROR: BOX3D parser - doesn't start with BOX3D(
SELECT ST_ZMin(ST_GeomFromEWKT('CIRCULARSTRING(220268 150415 1,220227 150505 2,220227 150406 3)')); st_zmin -------- 1
